name: ai-product-starter
description: Kick off a new AI-driven product repo with a full planning foundation: docs, operating model, a TDD git/PR/AI-review/release workflow, and a phased backlog.

plugins.name: ai-product-starter
plugins.description: A skill that bootstraps a new product repository before any code: planning docs (roadmap, design, architecture, data model, AI strategy, monetization), an operating model, a TDD git/PR/AI-review/release workflow, and a phased execution backlog. Tool-agnostic output (AGENTS.md-based).
